activities_projects.title: Character Analysis of the Traveller
activities_projects.objective: Understand the traveller’s personality and observations
steps: Read the chapter 'Travel' carefully
Identify key traits of the traveller such as curiosity and attentiveness
Write at least five qualities with examples from the story
Discuss your findings in small groups
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse character behaviour and traits
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of traits with examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Journey
activities_projects.objective: Recognize stages and experiences in the traveller’s journey
steps: List the major events of the journey
Identify challenges faced and observations made by the traveller
Write a paragraph summarising the journey
Share your summary with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and narrative skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and clarity of the summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Theme Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Identify the themes conveyed through travel and exploration
steps: Discuss in pairs what the journey teaches about curiosity, patience, or discovery
Write a short paragraph explaining the theme
Present your ideas in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to identify and explain themes in literature
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and clarity of theme explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing Activity
activities_projects.objective: Develop descriptive writing based on the traveller’s experiences
steps: Choose a scene from the traveller’s journey
Write a paragraph describing what is seen, heard, and felt
Use descriptive words and expressions
Share your writing with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance observation and descriptive writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Use of descriptive language and clarity (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Recreation
activities_projects.objective: Improve understanding of dialogue and character interaction
steps: Select a short interaction from the story
Rewrite it as a dialogue between characters
Include emotions and expressions
Read the dialogue aloud to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop writing and communication skills

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Enhancement
activities_projects.objective: Learn new words related to travel
steps: Identify at least 10 new or challenging words from the chapter
Write meanings and use them in sentences
Discuss meanings with a partner
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Travel Diary
steps: Imagine you are the traveller
Write a diary entry describing a day from your journey
Include experiences, observations, and feelings
Share your diary entry with a classmate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop narrative and reflective writing skills

activities_projects.title: Grammar Activity: Sentence Types
activities_projects.objective: Identify and write complex and compound sentences
steps: Find examples of complex sentences in the chapter
Underline the main clause and subordinate clause
Write three new sentences about the journey using complex structures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve grammar and sentence construction skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correctness and clarity of sentences (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Compare Journeys
steps: Discuss with a partner how the traveller’s journey differs from your own travel experience
Write a paragraph highlighting similarities and differences
Share your comparison with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn comparative thinking and writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Relevance and clarity of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Alternate Ending
steps: Think about an alternate ending for the traveller’s journey
Write a short narrative explaining the new ending
Include reflections on experiences and lessons learned
Share your alternate ending with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creativity and storytelling skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, coherence, and relevance to the story (10 marks)
